L

launch(FlixelGame) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode and with a default configuration object.
launch(FlixelGame, String...) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode and with pre-made configuration object.
launch(FlixelGame, FlixelRuntimeMode, Lwjgl3ApplicationConfiguration) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game in RELEASE mode using the given configuration.
launch(FlixelGame, FlixelRuntimeMode, String...) - Static method in class me.stringdotjar.flixelgdx.backend.lwjgl3.FlixelLwjgl3Launcher
Launches the LWJGL3 version of the Flixel game with the given runtime mode and a pre-made configuration object.
